name: Aladdin - Naam Toh Suna Hoga
overview: Aladdin is an age-old fantasy tale of a 20-year-old boy and his travails around his family and love. It is an absolute family entertainer show. It has got the fantastical factor of classic tale as well as the nail-biting thriller, heart-warming romance and affecting family equations. Despite being set in a very old legendary talismanic era, all the characters are entertaining, yet relatable which makes the fans correlate with its humor.

trailers.title: Aladdin – Naam Toh Suna Hoga | Starts 21st August 2018
